Part.Source:
Event Start
&AuthenticationTypes = GAMRepository.GetEnabledAuthenticationTypes(&Language,&Errors) For &AuthenticationType in &AuthenticationTypes &DefaultAuthTypeName.AddItem(&AuthenticationType.Name,&AuthenticationType.Description) EndFor &SecurityPolicies = GAMRepository.GetSecurityPolicies(&FilterSecPol, &Errors) For &SecurityPolicy in &SecurityPolicies &DefaultSecurityPolicyId.AddItem(&SecurityPolicy.Id,&SecurityPolicy.Name) EndFor &Roles = GAMRepository.GetRoles(&FilterRole, &Errors) For &Role in &Roles &DefaultRoleId.AddItem(&Role.Id,&Role.Name) EndFor
If &Id.IsEmpty() &RepoId = GAMRepository.GetId() Else &RepoId = &Id EndIf
&Repository.Load(&RepoId) &GUID = &Repository.GUID &NameSpace = &Repository.NameSpace &Name = &Repository.Name &Dsc = &Repository.Description &DefaultAuthTypeName = &Repository.DefaultAuthenticationTypeName &UserIdentification = GAMRepositoryUserIdentifications.Convert(&Repository.UserIdentification) &GenerateSessionStatistics = GAMGenerateSessionStatistics.Convert(&Repository.GenerateSessionStatistics) &UserActivationMethod = GAMRepositoryRememberUserTypes.Convert(&Repository.UserActivationMethod) &UserAutomaticActivationTimeout = &Repository.UserAutomaticActivationTimeout &UserRememberMeType = GAMRepositoryRememberUserTypes.Convert(&Repository.UserRememberMeType) &UserRememberMeTimeOut = &Repository.UserRememberMeTimeOut &UserRecoveryPasswordKeyTimeOut = &Repository.UserRecoveryPasswordKeyTimeOut &MinimumAmountCharactersInLogin = &Repository.MinimumAmountCharactersInLogin &LoginAttemptsToLockUser = &Repository.LoginAttemptsToLockUser &GAMUnblockUserTimeout = &Repository.GAMUnblockUserTimeout &LoginAttemptsToLockSession = &Repository.LoginAttemptsToLockSession &UserSessionCacheTimeout = &Repository.UserSessionCacheTimeout &RepositoryCacheTimeout = &Repository.CacheTimeout &LogoutBehavior = &Repository.GAMRemoteLogoutBehavior &SecurityAdministratorEmail = &Repository.SecurityAdministratorEmail &GiveAnonymousSession = &Repository.GiveAnonymousSession &CanRegisterUsers = &Repository.CanRegisterUsers &UserEmailisUnique = &Repository.UserEmailisUnique &DefaultRoleId = &Repository.DefaultRoleId &DefaultSecurityPolicyId = &Repository.DefaultSecurityPolicyId &EnableWorkingAsGAMManagerRepo = &Repository.EnableWorkingAsGAMManagerRepository &EnableTracing = &Repository.EnableTracing &AllowOauthAccess = &Repository.AllowOauthAccess &SessionExpiresOnIPChange = &Repository.SessionExpiresOnIPChange &RequiredPassword = &Repository.RequiredPassword &RequiredEmail = &Repository.RequiredEmail &RequiredFirstName = &Repository.RequiredFirstName &RequiredLastName = &Repository.RequiredLastName &RequiredBirthday = &Repository.RequiredBirthday &RequiredGender = &Repository.RequiredGender If not &Repository.AuthenticationMasterRepositoryId.IsEmpty() &RepositoryCollection = GeneXusSecurity.GAM.GetAllRepositories(&Filter, &Errors) If &RepositoryCollection.Count > 1 For &GAMRepositoryItem in &RepositoryCollection If &GAMRepositoryItem.Id = &Repository.AuthenticationMasterRepositoryId &AuthenticationMasterRepository = &GAMRepositoryItem.GUID.Trim() + " - " + &GAMRepositoryItem.Name.Trim() Exit Endif Endfor Endif Endif
&EmailServerHost = &Repository.Email.ServerHost &EmailServerPort = &Repository.Email.ServerPort &EmailServerSecure = &Repository.Email.ServerSecure &EmailServerTimeout = &Repository.Email.ServerTimeout &EmailServerUsesAuthentication = &Repository.Email.ServerUsesAuthentication &ServerSenderAddress = &Repository.Email.ServerSenderAddress &ServerSenderName = &Repository.Email.ServerSenderName If &EmailServerUsesAuthentication &EmailServerAuthenticationUsername = &Repository.Email.ServerAuthenticationUserName &EmailServerAuthenticationUserPassword = &Repository.Email.ServerAuthenticationUserPassword Endif &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserActivateAccount = &Repository.Email.SendEmailWhenUserActivateAccount If &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserActivateAccount &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserActivateAccount = &Repository.Email.SubjectWhenUserActivateAccount &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserActivateAccount = &Repository.Email.BodyWhenUserActivateAccount Endif &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangePassword = &Repository.Email.SendEmailWhenUserChangePassword If &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangePassword &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangePassword = &Repository.Email.SubjectWhenUserChangePassword &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangePassword = &Repository.Email.BodyWhenUserChangePassword Endif &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangeEmail = &Repository.Email.SendEmailWhenUserChangeEmail If &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangeEmail &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangeEmail = &Repository.Email.SubjectWhenUserChangeEmail &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangeEmail = &Repository.Email.BodyWhenUserChangeEmail Endif &EmailServer_SendEmailForRecoveryPassword = &Repository.Email.SendEmailToRecoverUserPassword If &EmailServer_SendEmailForRecoveryPassword &EmailServer_EmailSubjectForRecoveryPassword = &Repository.Email.SubjectToRecoverUserPassword &EmailServer_EmailBodyForRecoveryPassword = &Repository.Email.BodyToRecoverUserPassword Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
TextBlockTitle.Caption = Form.Caption
EndEvent
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If Not (&EmailServerUsesAuthentication) &EmailServerAuthenticationUsername.Visible = False EmailServerAuthenticationUsername_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EmailServerAuthenticationUsername.Visible = True EmailServerAuthenticationUsername_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&EmailServerUsesAuthentication) &EmailServerAuthenticationUserPassword.Visible = False EmailServerAuthenticationUserPassword_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EmailServerAuthenticationUserPassword.Visible = True EmailServerAuthenticationUserPassword_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserActivateAccount) &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserActivateAccount.Visible = False EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserActivateAccount_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserActivateAccount.Visible = True EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserActivateAccount_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserActivateAccount) &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserActivateAccount.Visible = False EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserActivateAccount_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserActivateAccount.Visible = True EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserActivateAccount_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangePassword) &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangePassword.Visible = False EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangePassword_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangePassword.Visible = True EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangePassword_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangePassword) &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangePassword.Visible = False EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangePassword_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangePassword.Visible = True EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangePassword_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangeEmail) &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangeEmail.Visible = False EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangeEmail_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangeEmail.Visible = True EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangeEmail_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangeEmail) &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangeEmail.Visible = False EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangeEmail_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangeEmail.Visible = True EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangeEmail_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&EmailServer_SendEmailForRecoveryPassword) &EmailServer_EmailSubjectForRecoveryPassword.Visible = False EmailServer_EmailSubjectForRecoveryPassword_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EmailServer_EmailSubjectForRecoveryPassword.Visible = True EmailServer_EmailSubjectForRecoveryPassword_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&EmailServer_SendEmailForRecoveryPassword) &EmailServer_EmailBodyForRecoveryPassword.Visible = False EmailServer_EmailBodyForRecoveryPassword_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EmailServer_EmailBodyForRecoveryPassword.Visible = True EmailServer_EmailBodyForRecoveryPassword_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (Not (&UserIdentification = GAMRepositoryUserIdentifications.EMail OR &UserIdentification = GAMRepositoryUserIdentifications.NameEmail)) &UserEmailisUnique.Visible = False UserEmailisUnique_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &UserEmailisUnique.Visible = True UserEmailisUnique_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (Not (&UserIdentification = GAMRepositoryUserIdentifications.EMail OR &UserIdentification = GAMRepositoryUserIdentifications.NameEmail)) &RequiredEmail.Visible = False RequiredEmail_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &RequiredEmail.Visible = True RequiredEmail_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (not &Repository.AuthenticationMasterRepositoryId.IsEmpty() and &RepositoryCollection.Count > 1) &AuthenticationMasterRepository.Visible = False AuthenticationMasterRepository_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &AuthenticationMasterRepository.Visible = True AuthenticationMasterRepository_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&Repository.AuthenticationMasterRepositoryId.IsEmpty()) &DefaultAuthTypeName.Visible = False DefaultAuthTypeName_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &DefaultAuthTypeName.Visible = True DefaultAuthTypeName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&Repository.AuthenticationMasterRepositoryId.IsEmpty()) &DefaultRoleId.Visible = False DefaultRoleId_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &DefaultRoleId.Visible = True DefaultRoleId_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&Repository.AuthenticationMasterRepositoryId.IsEmpty()) &DefaultSecurityPolicyId.Visible = False DefaultSecurityPolicyId_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &DefaultSecurityPolicyId.Visible = True DefaultSecurityPolicyId_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&Repository.AuthenticationMasterRepositoryId.IsEmpty()) &EnableWorkingAsGAMManagerRepo.Visible = False EnableWorkingAsGAMManagerRepo_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &EnableWorkingAsGAMManagerRepo.Visible = True EnableWorkingAsGAMManagerRepo_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event Enter
&Repository.Load(&RepoId) &Repository.Name = &Name &Repository.Description = &Dsc &Repository.DefaultAuthenticationTypeName = &DefaultAuthTypeName &Repository.UserIdentification = &UserIdentification &Repository.GenerateSessionStatistics = &GenerateSessionStatistics &Repository.UserActivationMethod = &UserActivationMethod &Repository.UserAutomaticActivationTimeout = &UserAutomaticActivationTimeout &Repository.GAMUnblockUserTimeout = &GAMUnblockUserTimeout &Repository.UserRememberMeType = &UserRememberMeType &Repository.UserRememberMeTimeOut = &UserRememberMeTimeOut &Repository.UserRecoveryPasswordKeyTimeOut = &UserRecoveryPasswordKeyTimeOut &Repository.GAMRemoteLogoutBehavior = &LogoutBehavior &Repository.MinimumAmountCharactersInLogin = &MinimumAmountCharactersInLogin &Repository.LoginAttemptsToLockUser = &LoginAttemptsToLockUser &Repository.LoginAttemptsToLockSession = &LoginAttemptsToLockSession &Repository.UserSessionCacheTimeout = &UserSessionCacheTimeout &Repository.CacheTimeout = &RepositoryCacheTimeout &Repository.SecurityAdministratorEmail = &SecurityAdministratorEmail &Repository.GiveAnonymousSession = &GiveAnonymousSession &Repository.CanRegisterUsers = &CanRegisterUsers &Repository.UserEmailisUnique = &UserEmailisUnique &Repository.DefaultRoleId = &DefaultRoleId &Repository.DefaultSecurityPolicyId = &DefaultSecurityPolicyId &Repository.EnableWorkingAsGAMManagerRepository = &EnableWorkingAsGAMManagerRepo &Repository.EnableTracing = &EnableTracing &Repository.AllowOauthAccess = &AllowOauthAccess &Repository.SessionExpiresOnIPChange = &SessionExpiresOnIPChange &Repository.RequiredPassword = &RequiredPassword &Repository.RequiredEmail = &RequiredEmail &Repository.RequiredFirstName = &RequiredFirstName &Repository.RequiredLastName = &RequiredLastName &Repository.RequiredBirthday = &RequiredBirthday &Repository.RequiredGender = &RequiredGender &Repository.Email.ServerHost = &EmailServerHost &Repository.Email.ServerPort = &EmailServerPort &Repository.Email.ServerSecure = &EmailServerSecure &Repository.Email.ServerTimeout = &EmailServerTimeout &Repository.Email.ServerUsesAuthentication = &EmailServerUsesAuthentication &Repository.Email.ServerSenderAddress = &ServerSenderAddress &Repository.Email.ServerSenderName = &ServerSenderName If &EmailServerUsesAuthentication &Repository.Email.ServerAuthenticationUserName = &EmailServerAuthenticationUsername &Repository.Email.ServerAuthenticationUserPassword = &EmailServerAuthenticationUserPassword Endif &Repository.Email.SendEmailWhenUserActivateAccount = &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserActivateAccount If &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserActivateAccount &Repository.Email.SubjectWhenUserActivateAccount = &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserActivateAccount &Repository.Email.BodyWhenUserActivateAccount = &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserActivateAccount Endif &Repository.Email.SendEmailWhenUserChangePassword = &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangePassword If &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangePassword &Repository.Email.SubjectWhenUserChangePassword = &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangePassword &Repository.Email.BodyWhenUserChangePassword = &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangePassword Endif &Repository.Email.SendEmailWhenUserChangeEmail = &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangeEmail If &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangeEmail &Repository.Email.SubjectWhenUserChangeEmail = &EmailServer_EmailSubjectWhenUserChangeEmail &Repository.Email.BodyWhenUserChangeEmail = &EmailServer_EmailBodyWhenUserChangeEmail Endif &Repository.Email.SendEmailToRecoverUserPassword = &EmailServer_SendEmailForRecoveryPassword If &EmailServer_SendEmailForRecoveryPassword &Repository.Email.SubjectToRecoverUserPassword = &EmailServer_EmailSubjectForRecoveryPassword &Repository.Email.BodyToRecoverUserPassword = &EmailServer_EmailBodyForRecoveryPassword Endif
&Repository.Save() if &Repository.Success() Commit Msg(GetMessageText("GXM_sucupdated")) else &Errors = &Repository.GetErrors() For &Error in &Errors Msg(Format(!"%1 (GAM%2)", &Error.Message, &Error.Code)) EndFor endif
EndEvent
Event &UserIdentification.ControlValueChanged
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &EmailServerUsesAuthentication.Click
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserActivateAccount.Click
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangePassword.Click
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &EmailServer_SendEmailWhenUserChangeEmail.Click
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &EmailServer_SendEmailForRecoveryPassword.Click
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Email body for activating a user account

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Email body for changing a user email

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Email body for changing a user password

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Email subject for activating a user account

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Email subject for changing a user email

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Email subject for changing a user password

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Send email when user activate account

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Send Email When User Change Email?

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Send email when user change password?

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: GAM Session expires on IP change?
